basic_details.job_title: OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Cook, and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Ainlachuan (OAV Ainlachuan) Warden, Cook, and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website oav.edu.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the OAV Ainlachuan Warden, Cook, and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 19 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification.

qualification.details: Warden (Female): Graduate (B.A./B.Sc.) with 2 years of experience. Assistant Cook (Female): Please refer to the official notification for eligibility details. Sweeper (Female): Please refer to the official notification for eligibility details. Cook (Female): HSC pass.

salary_details.details: Warden (Female): ₹ 29999.00 Per Month Assistant Cook (Female): ₹ 8000.00 Per Month Sweeper (Female): ₹ 3940.00 Per Month Cook (Female): ₹ 3400.00 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OAV Ainlachuan Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://oav.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OAV Ainlachuan Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OAV Ainlachuan Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Warden (Female): Graduate (B.A./B.Sc.) with 2 years of experience. Assistant Cook (Female): Please refer to the official notification for eligibility details. Sweeper (Female): Please refer to the official notification for eligibility details. Cook (Female): HSC pass.

content_sections.heading: OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 19 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification.

content_sections.heading: OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Warden (Female): ₹ 29999.00 Per Month Assistant Cook (Female): ₹ 8000.00 Per Month Sweeper (Female): ₹ 3940.00 Per Month Cook (Female): ₹ 3400.00 Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OAV Ainlachuan Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://oav.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the OAV Ainlachuan recruitment is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by OAV Ainlachuan?
faq.answer: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Ainlachuan has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the posts of Warden, Assistant Cook, Sweeper, and Cook.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 19 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation details are not provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post. For Warden, a Graduate degree (B.A./B.Sc.) with 2 years of experience is required. For Cook, HSC pass is needed. For Assistant Cook and Sweeper, specific qualifications are not detailed here.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The monthly salary ranges from Rs. 3400 to Rs. 29999, with specific amounts for each post: Warden (₹ 29999), Assistant Cook (₹ 8000), Sweeper (₹ 3940), and Cook (₹ 3400).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The primary selection process mentioned is Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on the verification of their submitted documents.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in the age limit?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any applicable age relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Ainlachuan, which is https://oav.edu.in.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026?
